modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help setting up duplex printing on my laptop.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to figure out how to get my laptop to print on both sides automatically. Right now, I have to do it manually, and it's really annoying. I just want my printer to be set up for two-sided printing without all the hassle. Can someone help me with this?
short_description: Need help setting up duplex printing on my laptop.
description: I'm trying to figure out how to get my laptop to print on both sides automatically. Right now, I have to do it manually, and it's really annoying. I just want my printer to be set up for two-sided printing without all the hassle. Can someone help me with this?
